name: /incident auto-increments the 3-digit suffix when multiple incidents are recorded on the same date per F-5 collision policy
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/incident.sh" 'first' --date 2026-05-25 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/incident.sh" 'second' --date 2026-05-25 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/incident.sh" 'third' --date 2026-05-25 2>/dev/null && [ -d incidents/2026-05-25-001 ] && [ -d incidents/2026-05-25-002 ] && [ -d incidents/2026-05-25-003 ] && echo incremented 1>&2
